aiUsageSettingsDescription: Track your AI budget, switch between Auto and Premium models, and manage your plan.
planUsageCreditsRemaining: {remaining} credits remaining — refills at billing cycle end
planUsageAiModelDescription: Auto uses a lower-cost model. Premium lets you pick an AI model (OpenAI or Claude) — credits scale with tokens used and model cost (~{credits} credit per typical message).
firmProfileDescription: Your firm profile and account details.
dataConsentConsumerBody: Optionally allow anonymized documents and reports to improve legal guidance. Personal details are removed where possible. Your legal report works even if you decline.
dataConsentFirmBody: Default: OFF. You can optionally allow anonymized AI output quality evaluation for your firm in {country}.
dataConsentOptInActive: Opt-in active — you can withdraw anytime
dataConsentEnabledMessage: Anonymized data sharing enabled. You can withdraw anytime.
dataConsentDisabledMessage: Your data will not be used for platform improvement.
dataConsentWithdrawnMessage: Consent withdrawn. Future data will not be used for improvement.
privacySecureTokenStorageBody: Session tokens are stored in platform secure storage and cleared on logout.
privacyConsentControlledBody: AI improvement consent is optional and can be withdrawn from Data consent.
privacySensitiveDataUxBody: Legal reports, matters, documents, and client data are treated as sensitive by default.
privacyBiometricsReadinessBody: Optional device unlock can be added without changing the account security model.
control_training_opt-in_and_data_use_def: Control training opt-in and data use. Default is off.
checking_firm_training_preferences: Checking the current firm training and AI processing preferences.
privacy_choice_recorded_for_firm: Your privacy choice has been recorded for this firm workspace.
control_anonymized_firm_data_for_ai: Control whether anonymized firm data may be used for AI improvement. Default is off.
